bead.title: docs: add ADR-012 routing snapshot addenda
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-491dd1e3/fizeau-e6145528 found the ADR-012 epic promised FEAT-004 and ADR-009 addenda documenting routing's consumption of the assembled snapshot and harness-as-provider identity, but those addenda are absent.

In scope:
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-004-model-routing.md
- docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-009-routing-surface-redesign.md
- optional cross-reference in FEAT-006 if needed

Out of scope:
- Implementing routing consumption; separate bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n "fiz models|assembled snapshot|KnownModel|harness-as-provider|harness as provider|ADR-012" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-004-model-routing.md docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-009-routing-surface-redesign.md finds explicit addenda in both docs.
2. rg -n "routing reads.*snapshot|snapshot.*routing|provider, model" docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-004-model-routing.md proves FEAT-004 documents routing consumption intent.
3. lefthook run pre-commit --all-files passes.
